Kit_Mortar_And_Pestle.description: A simple tool for crafting resins, pastes, medicines and more.
Kit_Mortar_And_Pestle.flavorText: The tool of chefs, herbalists, apothecaries and alchemists.

Kit_Oxite_Dissolver.description: A more efficient oxidizer for processing oxite into oxygen.
Kit_Oxite_Dissolver.flavorText: Place oxite and an appropriate container into the dissolver to start filling it. Requires sulfur for fuel.

Kit_Stone_Furnace.description: A simple stone furnace for smelting iron, copper and steel.
Kit_Stone_Furnace.flavorText: Bronze-age technology, spread to the stars.

Kit_Concrete_Furnace.description: An insulated, high-temperature furnace for smelting a wide range of materials including steel.
Kit_Concrete_Furnace.flavorText: Icarus\'s oxygen levels may slow combustion, but ceramic insulation produces temperatures sufficient for smelting more advanced alloys.

Kit_Electric_Furnace.description: A laboratory grade arc furnace, smelts basic and advanced materials alike.

Kit_Generator.description: An efficient, if basic biofuel-driven electric generator.
Kit_Generator.flavorText: Literally or figuratively, we\'ve come a long way from the Faraday Disc.

Kit_Radar.flavorText: This inverse synthetic aperture radar was manufactured by Larkwell Martinez, a leading defense contractor with deep ties to the ACS.

Kit_Machining_Bench.description: Upgrades your manufacturing abilities with basic machine tools.

Kit_Wood_Cupboard.description: A place to put necessities ... and the rest.

Kit_Skinning_Bench.description: Fully processes animal carcasses for more resources.
Kit_Skinning_Bench.flavorText: As any hunter knows, preparing an animal can be a slow, messy, wasteful task. The right tools make all the difference.

Kit_Wall_Torch.description: A mounted flame for adorning shelter walls.
Kit_Wall_Torch.flavorText: Lower oxygen levels produce a dirty, but workable flame.

Kit_Floor_Torch.description: A free-standing torch requiring sticks for fuel.
Kit_Floor_Torch.flavorText: Oxygen levels may be a little lower, but fire provides light well enough.

Kitchen_Stove.flavorText: A well-crafted, solidly insulated stove for discerning off-world chefs.

Kitchen_Storage.description: A compact module for all your kitchen storage needs.
Kitchen_Storage.flavorText: For the demanding Icarus ingredient hoarder, a small module with 40 storage slots.

Kitchen_Sink.description: Fully plumbed basin and running water, a luxury of sorts.

Kitchen_Bench.description: A modular workspace for cooking and concocting complex recipes.
Kitchen_Bench.flavorText: Prep advanced food recipes here to assist on your adventures

Knife_Attachment_Prime_Meat_Chance_1.description: An attachment that increases your chance of gathering Prime Meat from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Prime_Meat_Chance_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_Prime_Meat_Chance_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your chance of gathering Prime Meat from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Prime_Meat_Chance_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_Leather_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases your chance of gathering leather from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Leather_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_Leather_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your chance of gathering leather from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Leather_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_Bone_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of bone from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Bone_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_Bone_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of bone from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Bone_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Kumara.description: A sweet potato, typically with red skin and yellow or orange flesh.
Kumara.flavorText: Often found in Pacific island and Maori cuisine.

Komodo_Statue_Stone.description: A fearsome foe made of stone.
Komodo_Statue_Stone.flavorText: They are cute when they aren\'t charging you.

Kea_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Kea.
Kea_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Kea_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Komodo_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Komodo_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Komodo.
Komodo_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Kiwi_Head.description: A preserved memory of a small flightless bird.
Kiwi_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Kitchen_Corner_Bench.description: Can be used to make unique kitchen designs.

Kiwi_Nest.description: A hastily built kiwi nest for establishing a new colony on Icarus.
Kiwi_Nest.flavorText: Pretty good, even if it only took 5 minutes.

Kiwi_Fruit.description: Sweet and Refreshing and a little bit Tangy.
Kiwi_Fruit.flavorText: Also known as a Chinese Gooseberry

Kiwi_Trophy.description: A preserved flightless bird, that once lived on Icarus.
Kiwi_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Kiwifruit_Jam.flavorText: A handy snack made at your Kitchen Bench.

Kiwifruit_Sorbet.description: A delicious frozen dessert made from local ingredients.

Knife_Attachment_VestigeChance_1.description: An attachment that adds a chance to obtain a vestige when skinning.
Knife_Attachment_VestigeChance_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid tool at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_VestigeChance_2.description: An attachment that adds a chance to obtain a vestige when skinning.
Knife_Attachment_VestigeChance_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid tool at an Alteration Bench.
